violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Store food service related items away from drain lines in basement storage area.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Wooden crates used for storage shelving in walk in freezer not properly sealed.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. See table.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Use test strips on a regular basis to ensure proper chemical sanitizing concentrations are maintained.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. See table.--Ware wash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. Spindles in dish machine clogged. Utensils not being adequately rinsed. Service as required.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Styrofoam insulation around air conditioning unit in walk in cooler exposed. Unfinished construction.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor in walk in freezer has build up of debris and needs cleaning. Floor under line equipment needs cleaning. Clean along wall junctures. Wall near hood system discolored and needs cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
